# Heading

Titles a section with a semantic heading level.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/heading
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="heading" example={0} code={`<Heading as="h1">Page title</Heading>`} />

```tsx
<Heading as="h1">Page title</Heading>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="heading" example={1} code={`<Heading as="h2">Section heading</Heading>`} />

```tsx
<Heading as="h2">Section heading</Heading>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="heading"
  example={2}
  code={`<Heading as="h1" size="display">Hero headline</Heading>`}
/>

```tsx
<Heading as="h1" size="display">
  Hero headline
</Heading>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="heading"
  example={3}
  code={`<Heading as="h3" tone="accent">Tinted subsection</Heading>`}
/>

```tsx
<Heading as="h3" tone="accent">
  Tinted subsection
</Heading>
```

## Props

| Prop        | Type           | Required | Default | Description                                                                                          |
| ----------- | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `as`        | `HeadingLevel` | No       | -       | Heading level. Renders the matching \`<hN>\` and picks its textStyle by default. Defaults to \`h2\`. |
| `color`     | `TextColor`    | No       | -       | Neutral foreground colour. Ignored when \`tone\` is set. Defaults to \`default\`.                    |
| `lineClamp` | `number`       | No       | -       | -                                                                                                    |
| `size`      | `TextSize`     | No       | -       | Visual size, decoupled from the semantic level. Defaults to match \`as\`.                            |
| `tone`      | `Tone`         | No       | -       | Selects a semantic status palette, overriding \`color\`.                                             |
| `truncate`  | `boolean`      | No       | -       | -                                                                                                    |
| `align`     | `TextAlign`    | No       | -       | -                                                                                                    |
| `weight`    | `TextWeight`   | No       | -       | Defaults to \`semibold\`.                                                                            |

## Variants

| Variant    | Values                                                                                                     |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `size`     | `displayLg`, `display`, `h1`, `h2`, `h3`, `h4`, `h5`, `h6`, `bodyLg`, `body`, `bodySm`, `caption`, `micro` |
| `weight`   | `regular`, `medium`, `semibold`, `bold`                                                                    |
| `align`    | `start`, `center`, `end`, `justify`                                                                        |
| `truncate` | `true`                                                                                                     |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/heading.json`
- Recipe: `text`
- Files: `src/components/ui/heading.tsx`
